data.body: PASS-1 review (G6 — approach soundness): PASS, no findings. The chosen mechanism (reuse signing.sign_manifest / the SIGNATURE event under the env HMAC key, bind a material fingerprint into the signed manifest, inherit code-HEAD freshness, exclude tags/comments/links/assignee from invalidation) matches the implemented design in src/rebar/llm/plan_review/attest.py and docs/plan-review-gate.md §Attestation; mechanism is correct and fit-for-purpose. Structural alternatives (detached-signature artifact / content-addressed verdict store) are clearly worse on key-custody, blast-radius, and codebase-alignment, so the chosen approach is defensible. Positive rationale is stated (Why: composable CI rigor; Scope: reuse close-gate signing, no new key custody, inherited integrity/forgery/replay/staleness model).
